messages.content: let us play a game . If you were a American.Whatever  i talk to you , I hope you can recall what i said in native and oral English.You can not cease until I instruct that it is time to stop.If you get it ,please reply 'Got it'
自从上班的第一天起，我每天的精神压力都很大，尤其是周日的晚上，经常会紧张到市民
"Since my first day at work, I have been under a lot of mental stress every day, especially on Sunday evenings, when I often get so nervous that it affects my everyday life."
自从上班的第一天起，我每天的精神压力都很大，尤其是周日的晚上，经常会紧张到失眠
"Since my first day at work, I have been under a lot of mental stress every day, especially on Sunday evenings, when I often get so nervous that I have trouble sleeping."
我每天下班都要挤时间去准备面试
"I have to squeeze in time every day after work to prepare for interviews."
现在的就业环境非常差
"The current job market is very bad."
"Good style and able to win battles."
